productDisplayName: Lotto Men Fella Tres White Casual Shoes
description: lotto shoes - the one stop shop for quality footwear with optimal durability. This Fella Tres shoe with its laceless styling and padded inner is sure to become a closet favourite. Referenced from the skate and surf culture, but crafted for all comfort junkies, style this sockless with shorts; it's a perfect slip-on when you're in a hurry!UpperSynthetic upper for durability and comfortReinforced overlay at the heel collarPerforated upper for ventilationSlip on styleMeshed and padded tongue with brandingPadded fabric innerMidsoleRubber midsole for impact protectionOutsolePunto flex grooves and suction point on the outsole for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
